1369097325110186.body:
Behind Closed Doors with Fynd
Did you know your underwear has an expiration date?
Most women are surprised to learn that gynecologists recommend replacing your intimate wear every 6 months. Why? Because even with regular washing, bacterial growth is a real concern, especially when dealing with tight fabrics and high-compression shapewear.
At Krvvy, education comes before the sale. We’re vocal about the “12-15 hour rule” recommending a limit on how long you should wear compression garments to prioritize your health. From choosing the right breathable fabrics to understanding the specific use case for every level of compression, we’re changing how India thinks about intimate wellness.
Full episode with Yash, co-founder & CEO of Krvvy, is on YouTube now. Ep 26.
How often do you actually refresh your intimate wear drawer? Be honest! 👇

Jockey has been in India for 30 years.
More distribution than almost any apparel brand. A supply chain that most D2C founders can only dream about.

I want to study and implement what they built. And then I’m adding inclusive assortment. That’s the takeover.’
